title: Lineage Record
description: Canonical lineage record capturing the provenance chain of a governed artifact. Emitted by the artifact_emitter helper alongside every artifact.

artifact_id.description: Identifier of the artifact whose lineage this record describes.

parent_artifacts.description: List of artifact_ids that this artifact was derived from. Empty list for root/input artifacts.

producing_module.description: Module or engine that produced this artifact.

run_id.description: Deterministic run identifier that produced this artifact.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this lineage record was emitted.
